title: Parrots
medium: Oil pastels on paper, not framed
description: This work emerged from living between landscapes. The forms exist in the space between, neither fully translated nor fully foreign.

title: Field
medium: Oil pastels on paper, not framed
description: The figures are happening and dissolving with the background, but we are still able to catch their movement.

title: Phoenix
medium: Oil pastels on paper, not framed
description: The image of a bird that can reassemble itself is in the center of the painting. In scattered spots, it converges and collapses.
